name: create_product
description: Create a new product in the WooCommerce store with name, type, regular price, description, categories, images, and stock management settings. Supports simple, grouped, external, and variable product types.

parameters.name: regular_price
parameters.description: Product regular price as a string.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Full HTML description of the product.
parameters.example: A premium quality cotton t-shirt available in multiple sizes.

parameters.name: short_description
parameters.description: Short HTML description shown in product listings.

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Array of category objects with 'id' to assign the product to.

parameters.name: images
parameters.description: Array of image objects with 'src' URL to attach to the product.

parameters.name: manage_stock
parameters.description: Enable stock management for this product.

parameters.name: stock_quantity
parameters.description: Number of items in stock (requires manage_stock to be true).

parameters.name: sale_price
parameters.description: Product sale price as a string (must be lower than regular_price).

body.name: Premium Quality T-Shirt
body.description: A premium quality cotton t-shirt available in multiple sizes.
